task.title: Viewing the return code for a job
task.shortdesc: You can see the return code for a job that completed.

step.cmd: Select the job output that you want to view and then select Open.

info.note: Since the output is displayed in the editor, you can view multiple sessions of job output at the same time.

step.cmd: To look at the return code, specify the term to be searched as RC= and click OK.

info.note: If the return code is nonzero, you might want to examine other parts of the job output to determine the problem.
